{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/137510281?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/baradika", "id": 137510281, "login": "baradika", "node_id": "U_kgDOCDI9iQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47744", "cvss": {"score": 9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-269", "name": "Improper Privilege Management"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "## Impact

Two distinct authorization defects in the team settings allowed any authenticated panel user to take over the RBAC system:

- `Settings/Team/Index` had no `mount()` authorization. Any authenticated user could load the page and use its public actions to create new roles and delete other users, including administrators.
- `Settings/Team/RolePermission` gated its write actions on the read-only `view_users` permission. Any user holding `view_users` could grant themselves or any other user arbitrary permissions, including `manage_users` and `edit_orders`, effectively escalating to full panel administrator from a read-only account.

Combined, these two defects allow a low-privilege authenticated user to obtain administrator privileges and remove the legitimate administrators from the panel.

## Patches

Fixed in `v2.8.0`:

- `Settings/Team/Index::mount()` now authorizes against `manage_users`.
- `Settings/Team/RolePermission` write actions now require `manage_users` instead of `view_users`.

Upgrade via:

```bash
composer require shopper/admin:^2.8
```

## Workarounds

None. Upgrade to `v2.8.0`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00321, "percentile": 0.23665}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T20:35:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47744"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T19:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-06-05T20:35:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper/security/advisories/GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47744", "https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper/pull/511", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/shopperlabs/shopper/security-advisories/GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper", "summary": "Shopper: Authorization bypass and RBAC privilege escalation in team settings", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T20:35:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3qp-2ggw-xjg7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopper/framework"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Shopper: Authorization bypass and RBAC privilege escalation in team settings
